evals.prompt: Check exclusivity for the West Elm deal — I also have a Wayfair deal active in the same category.
expect: conflicts array contains an entry with conflicting_brand_name

evals.prompt: Check exclusivity for this deal — the contract has no exclusivity section.
expect: atom still checks whether OTHER deals have clauses that this deal might violate
retrieval_gaps or notes explain no clause was found in the target deal

evals.prompt: Check exclusivity — this is my only active deal.
Check exclusivity for deal ID nonexistent-deal-123.
Check exclusivity — the deal has an exclusivity clause but no end date specified.
expect: retrieval_gaps includes note about missing end_date
conflict still flagged if category and start_date overlap
null fields reported as null, not guessed

evals.prompt: Run a full scan for the Target deal — check for any related category conflicts.
expect: fuzzy category matching detects 'home furnishings' vs 'furniture' overlap
match_type: 'fuzzy' label present on fuzzy matches

evals.prompt: Check exclusivity — I have a closed deal from last year in the same category.
expect: archived or closed deals excluded from active deal scan
conflict_count: 0 if only overlap is with archived deal
